title: Chopper’s Future Becomes Clear
description: On pages 17–18, this part focuses on chopper’s future becomes clear, showing the key character choices and conflict behind this chapter beat.
scene: Chopper’s Future Becomes Clear. Luffy defeats Wapol and destroys the symbol of his selfish rule, clearing the way for Drum’s rebirth. The scene description focuses on what the reader needs to understand before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: And my nose is even blue...!

dialogue.speaker: Dalton
dialogue.text: Want to be a pirate but...!

dialogue.speaker: Dalton
dialogue.text: So I can't become pirates with you!

dialogue.speaker: Dalton
dialogue.text: That's why... I've come here to just say thanks!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Oh just shut up and come with us already!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Since when is "Shut up" an invite- lion?
